title: lithocarpus elatus
intro: Lithocarpus elatus, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. The tree's bark, leaves, and roots possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus elatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are typically dried, powdered, or made into tea infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
